Defines flash regions for the filesystem used by the serial flash chip in Tintin/Bianca devices.

# Purpose
The file `filesystem_regions_n25q.h` is a C header file that defines macros for flash memory regions used by a serial flash chip in the Tintin/Bianca systems. It specifies different filesystem regions by using the `FILE_SYSTEM_REGIONS` macro, which takes a `MACRO_OPERATOR` as an argument to apply to each defined region. The file includes conditional compilation directives to differentiate between normal firmware and recovery firmware, with the latter including an additional region for erasure. This header is intended for inclusion only in the `filesystem_regions.c` file within the `core/flash_region` directory.
